card_status_alert: Issuer transition: Amex co-brand ending Aug 14, 2026 — replacement card will be issued by U.S. Bank.
_review_reason: Non-Prime version: 3% Amazon (vs Prime's 5%). No documented unconditional $ statement credits. Same Amex Venue caveat as Prime version — not card-specific. Other features qualitative: Amex Offers, basic insurance.
